functional: Page loads within 3 seconds on average connection
All internal navigation links work without errors
Images display correctly with appropriate fallback text
Page layout adjusts properly for screen widths from 320px to 1920px
No console errors in browser developer tools
content: Page includes exactly 5 Wuhan specialty snacks with complete information
Each snack section contains: Chinese name, English name, description (50-100 words), 3-5 key ingredients, and cultural context
Introduction section provides overview of Wuhan food culture (100-150 words)
Footer includes copyright notice and image attribution where applicable
All text content is original or properly attributed
design: Uses specified color scheme consistently throughout
Typography follows specified font families and hierarchy
Snack items display in responsive grid layout
Images have consistent styling (borders, shadows, aspect ratios)
Navigation is clearly visible and accessible on all devices
technical: HTML passes W3C validation with no critical errors
CSS is organized in logical sections with comments
CSS uses relative units (em, rem, %) where appropriate
Code follows consistent formatting and indentation
accessibility: All images have descriptive alt text
Color contrast meets WCAG AA standards
Page is navigable by keyboard only
